SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF REV. DR. WILLIAM MUNJAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS STEVEN CULBERTSON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT LAMAR COOPER IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT SEAN MONOR IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE.. DEFENDANT STEVEN CULBERTSON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT SUZETTE MOSES IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN WESTBROOK NOT APPEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN WESTBROOK, PALINTIFF DISMISSES AS TO GWENDOLYN WESTBROOK WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
